painPoints: Mobile LCP of 20.6 seconds is approximately 8× over the 2.5s target, causing visitors to abandon before the page renders
Total Blocking Time of 690ms on mobile far exceeds the 200ms target
Desktop LCP of 5.2 seconds exceeds acceptable thresholds
Location page TTFB of 3,296ms versus home page TTFB of 95ms — a 35× gap — indicates location templates are not cached
Hero images are uncompressed PNG/JPG (~1.4MB on mobile) instead of WebP with lazy loading
3+ render-blocking scripts in the <head> delay page rendering
Phone CTA is below the fold on most mobile pages — no sticky tap-to-call button
Licensure, 40-year history, and 4.9-star trust signals are below the fold and not visible on first paint

Brand is fragmented across three active domains: kirchnerelectricpro.com, kirchner-electric.com, and kirchner-electric.brandrepmarketing.com — splitting link equity, NAP signals, and AI citation paths
No 301 redirect strategy consolidating the three brand domains
Canonical tags are inconsistent across the three brand domains
Only 25 indexed pages for a 40-year business
28% duplicate content — well above the 15% healthy threshold — driven by templated location pages reusing identical service-description blocks
7 of 25 indexed pages contain HVAC content (air conditioners, furnaces, HVAC repair) on what is meant to be an electrician's website
Magnolia location page lists incorrect phone number (281) 775-4124 instead of correct (281) 755-4124
Bellaire location page lists two different addresses, one in Lake Hills, TX (San Antonio metro)
Alt-text coverage is only 62% against a 95%+ target
Average of only 7 internal links per page
Domain Rating is effectively zero with a near 1:1 backlink-to-referring-domain ratio indicating link earning has never been worked
Kirchner ranks 'Not in top 100' for every priority non-branded keyword including 'electrician cypress tx,' 'panel upgrade,' 'emergency electrician,' and 'generator installation near me'
No Local Services Ads running despite eligibility — competitors A1 Plus and Mister Sparky occupy the top LSA slots
LocalBusiness / Electrician schema is missing — no geo, hours, phone, or service area structured data
Service schema is missing for all individual services (generators, panels, EV chargers, FPE replacement)
Review and AggregateRating schema are missing — 237 reviews and 4.9-star rating are invisible to AI platforms
FAQPage schema is missing — no Q&A content tagged for SERP or AI surfaces
Article schema is missing — blog posts are not tagged for content surfaces
Organization schema present but LocalBusiness schema absent means AI and Google cannot confirm business type, location, or service area
Generator installation, panel upgrade, FPE Stab-Lok replacement, Tesla wall connector, and EV charger service pages lack city-specific meta titles and descriptions
Meta description missing on EV charger installation page
Meta description missing on panel upgrade page
Generator installation page meta description is a duplicate of the homepage description
Location pages for Magnolia, Bellaire, and The Woodlands have HVAC-focused meta titles and H1 tags instead of electrical
AI Visibility Score is 16 out of 100 — bottom decile nationally despite strong real-world reputation
Kirchner is not cited on Gemini, Perplexity, or ChatGPT Plus across the full AI test set
Kirchner is invisible on every service-specific AI query including generator install, panel upgrade, FPE replacement, EV charger, and Tesla wall connector
AEO score is 1 out of 10 — no featured snippets, People Also Ask presence, or voice-assistant answers
AI SEO score is 1 out of 10 — not surfacing in Google AI Overviews or Bing AI surfaces
GEO score is 3 out of 10 — minimal citation depth on ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity
LLM SEO score is 3 out of 10 — weak training-data citation footprint due to missing BBB, thin Yelp presence, and fragmented citations
25 of 37 directory listings contain inconsistent NAP data
No BBB profile despite 40 years in business
Yelp profile has 0 visible reviews and is linked to the non-canonical legacy domain
Nextdoor profile is filed under Tomball instead of Cypress — only 1 recommendation
Angi listing has an old phone number
HomeAdvisor listing has a stale address mismatch
Apple Maps and Bing Places both have stale hours
Multiple inconsistent Yellow Pages and Superpages entries
Facebook Business address is slightly off from GBP
Magnolia phone typo propagates across multiple directories
Bellaire dual-address conflict propagates across the directory set
GBP services list is incomplete — generators, EV chargers, FPE replacement, and Tesla wall connector not individually tagged
GBP posts have been dormant since Q3 2025 — no offers, project photos, or seasonal updates in 7+ months
GBP photo set contains only 18 photos, mostly older logo and van shots — no recent project work, team photos, or before/after panel upgrades
Owner response cadence on GBP reviews is inconsistent — ranging from same-day to weeks to no response
Facebook page has been dormant for 10+ months (last post June 19, 2025)
Instagram has only 4 lifetime posts and has been dormant for 16+ months (last post 2024)
Zero posts on Facebook or Instagram across the entire six-month window of December 2025 through May 2026
Nextdoor profile is misplaced in Tomball neighborhood instead of Cypress feeds
LinkedIn company page is effectively absent — no recent activity despite being the primary discovery channel for Carla, the highest-LTV commercial persona
No TikTok account exists — missing the channel Vanessa uses for brand discovery
No YouTube channel exists — missing long-tail compounding SEO asset
No X/Twitter account — not a priority but reflects overall channel neglect
No Google Tag Manager container deployed
No GA4 property tied to campaign performance
No Google Ads conversion tag installed
No Meta Pixel installed on the website
No LSA-eligible reporting integration configured
No retargeting capability against organic site visitors
No Google Ads campaigns running — all high-intent service keywords fully ceded to competitors
No Meta Ads campaigns running — no retargeting, no Cypress Facebook-group or Marketplace audience being addressed
Branded search term 'kirchner electric' is uncontested and undefended against competitor conquest bidding
The 4.9-star rating and 237 Google reviews are not surfaced anywhere outside GBP — no Review schema, no cross-platform reputation amplification
Facebook page has 12 reviews at 100% recommendation but the page is dormant and the reviews are not amplified
No Houzz listing despite it being a relevant home-services directory
Local chamber of commerce listing has an old address
The 40-year operating history is not structured or tagged in any way that AI platforms can read and cite
